pages.title: Tinkerer
pages.text: Tech gadgets. Sixteen items, hard recipes. Every gadget is built around a Redstone Mechanism — a class-gated intermediate at block-tier materials. Each gadget therefore takes two class-crafts: mechanism, then gadget.

pages.title: Core
pages.text: $(bold)Redstone Mechanism.$(/) The intermediate. Redstone and copper at block tier.$(br2)$(bold)Redstone Sheep.$(/) Automated shearer, two mechanisms.$(br2)$(bold)Extendo Grip.$(/) Reach extender. In-grid here, not the 5x5 mechanical-crafting version.

pages.title: Maritime gauges
pages.text: $(bold)Pocket Watch.$(/) Gilded clockwork.$(br2)$(bold)Depth Meter.$(/) Pressure gauge.$(br2)$(bold)Climate Gauge.$(/) Barometric.$(br2)$(bold)Weather Radio.$(/) Radio set.$(br2)$(bold)Lunar Calendar.$(/) Lunar dial.

pages.title: Tools and optics
pages.text: $(bold)Altimeter, Wrench.$(/) Supplementaries gear.$(br2)$(bold)Rope Arrow, Spring Launcher.$(/) Mobility.$(br2)$(bold)Camera, Color Film, Black-and-White Film, Projector.$(/) Plate photography and slide show.$(br2)Matching trader: the Tinkerer.
